label: Menologion for the month of Tamuz (July)

work_wit.alt_title: Menologion for the month of Tamuz (July)

excerpt.as_written: نبتدي بمعونة الله و حسن توفيقه نكتب

note: Beginning on the 2nd with the manifestation of Our Lady’s dress and ending on the 29th with the martyrdom of St. Theodota and her children
